The Friday 5:30 edit

It’s ५:३०. The laptop’s shut, the group chat’s buzzing, and the night hasn’t decided what it is yet.

Off the Clock is the wardrobe for that in-between hour — pieces that read boardroom at five and rooftop by nine. Three sneaker labels, three apparel houses. All made in India, all built for the part of the week you actually look forward to.
